data.name: ThemeEditor/ColorCopiedToClipboard
data.value: The color is copied to the clipboard

data.name: ThemeEditor/DragAndDropThemeHere
data.value: Drag and drop the theme file here

data.name: ThemeEditor/ThemeExported
data.value: The theme has been successfully exported

data.name: ThemeEditor/ThemeImported
data.value: The theme has been successfully imported

data.name: ThemeEditor/ThemeImportError
data.value: An error occurred while importing the theme

data.name: FullScreenButtonDescription
data.value: Show a full screen toggle button in the title bar

data.name: NavPositionDescription
data.value: Choose where the navigation pane is placed

data.name: Card/BreadcrumbBar
data.value: Shows a path of pages or folders to the current location.

data.name: Card/CommandBar
data.value: A toolbar with primary commands inline and overflow in a popup menu.

data.name: CommandBar/Description
data.value: CommandBar displays primary commands inline and moves overflow items into a popup. Supports dynamic overflow, label positions, toggle buttons, and separators.

data.name: CommandBar/BasicDesc
data.value: Click the … button to open the overflow popup. Secondary commands always appear there. Click any button to see the action below.

data.name: CommandBar/LabelBottomDesc
data.value: Set IsOpen="True" and IsSticky="True" to keep the bar permanently expanded so labels are always visible below each icon.

data.name: CommandBar/LabelRightDesc
data.value: Set DefaultLabelPosition="Right" to show labels beside the icon at all times.

data.name: CommandBar/DisplayModeDesc
data.value: ClosedDisplayMode controls what is visible when the bar is closed: Compact shows icons, Minimal shows only the … button.

data.name: CommandBar/OverflowDesc
data.value: When IsDynamicOverflowEnabled is true, primary commands automatically move to the overflow popup when there is not enough space.

data.name: CommandBar/ToggleDesc
data.value: CommandBarToggleButton supports checked/unchecked states with accent styling. The state is reflected below.

data.name: CommandBar/Prop/DefaultLabelPosition
data.value: Bottom (default), Right, or Collapsed — controls where labels appear relative to the icon.

data.name: CommandBar/Prop/ClosedDisplayMode
data.value: Compact, Minimal, or Hidden — controls what is visible when the bar is closed.

data.name: CommandBar/Prop/IsDynamicOverflowEnabled
data.value: When true, primary commands automatically move to the overflow popup when space is limited.

data.name: CommandBar/Prop/ItemsAlignment
data.value: Left or Right — controls how primary commands are aligned inside the bar.

data.name: CommandBar/Prop/PrimaryCommands
data.value: The collection of inline command elements. Also the XAML content property.

data.name: BreadcrumbBar/Description
data.value: BreadcrumbBar displays the direct path of pages or folders to the current location. Items that overflow the available width are collapsed into an ellipsis flyout.

data.name: BreadcrumbBar/BasicDesc
data.value: Declare BreadcrumbBarItem children directly. Click any item to raise the ItemClicked event.

data.name: BreadcrumbBar/ItemsSourceDesc
data.value: Bind an ObservableCollection to ItemsSource. Use Push / Pop / Reset to modify the path at runtime.

data.name: BreadcrumbBar/OverflowDesc
data.value: When items exceed the available width the control automatically collapses hidden items into an ellipsis button. Click it to see the flyout.

data.name: BreadcrumbBar/ClickableLastDesc
data.value: Set IsLastItemClickEnabled="True" to make the current (last) item interactive instead of rendering it as plain text.

data.name: BreadcrumbBar/Prop/ItemsSource
data.value: Bound collection used as the data source for the breadcrumb trail.

data.name: BreadcrumbBar/Prop/ItemTemplate
data.value: DataTemplate applied to each item when using ItemsSource.

data.name: BreadcrumbBar/Prop/IsLastItemClickEnabled
data.value: When true the last item is rendered as a clickable button instead of plain text.

data.name: BreadcrumbBar/Prop/ItemClicked
data.value: Raised when any item is clicked. Args expose Index (zero-based) and Item (the data object).

data.name: Card/DashboardCard
data.value: A structured card with header, content, and footer slots.

data.name: DashboardCard/Description
data.value: DashboardCard provides a structured card layout with a title, optional subtitle, right-side header slot (e.g. a time-range picker), scrollable content area, and an optional footer.

data.name: DashboardCard/BasicDesc
data.value: A card with a title, subtitle, and arbitrary content.

data.name: DashboardCard/ToolbarDesc
data.value: Use HeaderContent to place a ComboBox or any control in the header's right slot.

data.name: DashboardCard/FooterDesc
data.value: FooterContent renders a bordered strip at the bottom of the card.

data.name: Card/LogViewerPanel
data.value: A slide-in panel with filterable, searchable log entries.

data.name: LogViewerPanel/Description
data.value: LogViewerPanel is a slide-in panel with search, level/source filters, auto-scroll, copy-all, and clear. Click Open to show it, then add entries with the buttons.

data.name: LogViewerPanel/Hint
data.value: Log entries will appear in the panel →

data.name: Card/TerminalPanel
data.value: A terminal with monospace output and a command input line.

data.name: TerminalPanel/Description
data.value: TerminalPanel provides a monospace output area and a command input line. Type a command and press Enter — the demo echoes it back.

data.name: TerminalPanel/WelcomeMsg
data.value: PleasantUI Terminal Demo Type a command and press Enter.

data.name: Card/TreeViewPanel
data.value: A searchable, collapsible tree with section headers and count badges.

data.name: TreeViewPanel/Description
data.value: TreeViewPanel hosts collapsible TreeViewSection groups with a search/filter box, count badges, loading states, and a unified SelectionChanged event.

data.name: TreeViewPanel/DetailDesc
data.value: Use the filter box to search across all sections. Click any item to select it.

data.name: Card/ItemListPanel
data.value: A searchable list with multi-select, bulk actions, and loading overlay.

data.name: ItemListPanel/Description
data.value: ItemListPanel is a searchable, filterable list with multi-select mode, a bulk-action toolbar, loading overlay, empty state, and a footer slot for pagination.

data.name: ItemListPanel/EmptySubtitle
data.value: Add items using the Reload button above.

data.name: Card/StepDialog
data.value: A modal dialog that presents numbered steps with content slots.

data.name: StepDialog/Description
data.value: StepDialog is a modal overlay that presents a sequence of numbered StepItem steps. Each step has a header, optional description, and arbitrary content. Supports primary/secondary buttons and a status message.

data.name: StepDialog/BasicDesc
data.value: Three steps with a secondary Cancel button and a status message.

data.name: StepDialog/AuthDesc
data.value: Mimics the device-code authentication pattern with a code block and a link button.

data.name: Card/PropertyGrid
data.value: A two-column label/value grid for displaying metadata.

data.name: PropertyGrid/Description
data.value: PropertyGrid displays key-value metadata in a two-column layout. Rows support plain text, clickable links, colored status values, and custom templates.

data.name: Card/DownloadPanel
data.value: Visualizes a multi-chunk download with progress bar and chunk canvas.

data.name: DownloadPanel/Description
data.value: DownloadPanel visualizes a multi-chunk download with a tab strip, progress bar, chunk canvas, and action buttons. Use the controls below to simulate a download.

data.name: Card/CrashReportDialog
data.value: A Fluent-styled modal crash report with tabs, email validation, and send/save actions.

data.name: CrashReportDialog/Description
data.value: CrashReportDialog is a modal overlay with three tabs (General, Exception, Screenshot), email validation, send/save/cancel actions, and inline send-progress feedback.

data.name: CrashReportDialog/BasicDesc
data.value: Opens a pre-populated dialog from a fake NullReferenceException.

data.name: CrashReportDialog/EmailRequiredDesc
data.value: IsEmailRequired=True — the Send button is blocked until a valid email is entered.
